li.label: starving diet
li.description: The same disgusting slop every day. I can barely force it down anymore.

li.label: meager diet
li.description: I've been eating the same slop over and over. It's depressing.

li.label: poor diet
li.description: There's barely any variety in what I eat. So boring.

li.label: monotonous diet
li.description: The food is getting repetitive. I wish for something different.

li.label: ordinary diet
li.description: The food variety is acceptable. Nothing special.

li.label: good diet
li.description: Nice to have some variety in meals lately.

li.label: varied diet
li.description: The food has been wonderfully diverse. Every meal is a treat.

li.label: magnificent diet
li.description: Such an incredible variety of food! I feel like royalty.
